title: Thrasyopsis repanda
taxonomy: Thrasyopsis repanda is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It belongs to the genus Thrasyopsis. The genus Thrasyopsis is a group of plants that are native to Australia. Within the family Asteraceae, Thrasyopsis repanda is part of the subfamily Asteroideae. intro: Thrasyopsis repanda, also known as 'Woolly Thrasyopsis', is a type of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae, native to South America. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including its potential to act as an anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial agent, which may help in treating wounds and infections.
